messages.subject: Q3 deck — needs your review by EOD
messages.snippet: Hey Hersh, attaching v4 of the deck. I incorporated the feedback from Tuesday and would love your sign-off before I send to the board…
messages.body:
Hey Hersh,

Attaching v4 of the deck. I incorporated the feedback from Tuesday — specifically the slide on retention cohorts and the new pricing page.

Would love your sign-off before I send to the board tomorrow morning. If you have any final thoughts, just leave comments in the doc.

Thanks,
P.

messages.subject: re: integration timeline
messages.snippet: Hey, was thinking about what you said yesterday and I think the realistic path is to ship the read-only flow first…
messages.body:
Hey,

Was thinking about what you said yesterday and I think the realistic path is to ship the read-only flow first and layer in writes after the holidays.

Let me know if that works on your end. Happy to chat 15 min today if useful.

messages.subject: Photos from the trip
messages.snippet: Hi sweetheart, finally got around to uploading the photos from the trip. There's a great one of you and your sister on the beach…
messages.body:
Hi sweetheart, finally got around to uploading the photos from the trip. There's a great one of you and your sister on the beach — I'll print a couple for you.

Love,
Aunt R
